step_by_step_thinking:
Changes in plaque scores directly correlate with the effectiveness of oral hygiene practices. A reduction in plaque accumulation indicates that patients have better followed through with their newly learned oral care techniques, which reflects positively on their ability to maintain good dental health post-instruction.

Answer Choice: B C
